global.description: The ad features a warm background with abstract shapes and prominent text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting a travel app with a focus on convenience and discounts.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A warm, solid color background that fills the entire canvas, providing a cohesive backdrop for the other elements.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of abstract shapes, including an oval and a rectangle, positioned centrally with a soft, rounded appearance.

elements.label: Additional abstract shape
elements.description: A larger rectangle shape that overlaps with the other shapes, creating a layered effect in the center of the ad.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small, circular decorative element located near the center, adding visual interest to the composition.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, white text that reads 'Escape this weekend', prominently displayed at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Hotels flights in one tap

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'CloudRoute' appears in a smaller font at the top left corner, featuring a simple and modern design.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom center that reads 'Install now', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: Discount badge
elements.description: A small badge at the bottom left corner displaying '30%' in a contrasting color, indicating a discount.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern minimalist with soft shapes, promoting travel convenience.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the bottom, the logo is at the top left, and the CTA is centered at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Escape this weekend, Hotels + flights in one tap, CloudRoute, Install now, 30%
